1.description: Driving a phased Node.js monolith → microservices migration. Built an event-driven backend (Express + BullMQ + Redis), real-time booking APIs, and the React + Next.js frontend serving 2,000+ users. Mentor two junior engineers.

2.description: Built a marketplace for holistic healing services — REST APIs with Node.js + Postgres + Prisma, PayPal/Stripe payments, and the React + Next.js frontend. Cut page load time by ~30%.

3.description: Built payment APIs (.NET Core + MSSQL) and the React merchant dashboard for real-time transaction monitoring. Led merchant onboarding for DeshiPay and ShopUp.
